personalInfo.name: Jawahar Vignesh
personalInfo.title: Staff Software Development Engineer in Test
personalInfo.branding: Automation Architecture • Continuous Testing • AI/LLM Validation

summary: Lead Quality Engineer and SDET with 15+ years of experience designing scalable QA strategies and automation platforms across enterprise, embedded, and AI-driven systems. Experienced in building QA practices from the ground up, enabling continuous testing within CI/CD pipelines, and mentoring engineering teams toward shared quality ownership. Recently focused on validation and evaluation approaches for AI and LLM-based systems.
keyAchievements: Established QA practices and automation ecosystems from scratch across multiple organizations.
Designed unified automation frameworks covering API, UI, and performance testing.
Led quality initiatives supporting large multi-team engineering environments.
Introduced continuous testing practices integrated with CI/CD pipelines.
Applied automation and validation strategies to modern AI and LLM-based systems.
projectHighlights: Designed testing and evaluation workflows for AI/LLM systems and MCP servers.
Built Python-based automation platforms adopted across multiple product teams.
Automated complex hardware-integrated voice recognition testing workflows.
Led automation engineering for next-generation telematics platforms involving CAN and DoIP diagnostics.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Established organization-wide QA strategy for early-stage AI product teams.
Designed and implemented automation frameworks covering API, UI, and performance testing.
Enabled continuous testing through CI/CD pipeline integration.
Defined testing approaches for AI and LLM-based systems, including evaluation and reliability validation.

experience.title: Lead SDET
description: Provided consulting and process training to engineering teams on scalable QA practices.
Designed automation frameworks supporting multiple concurrent projects.
Identified delivery risks and introduced quality-driven mitigation strategies.
Supported process improvement initiatives through data-driven evaluation.

experience.title: Senior SDET
description: Delivered functional and regression automation solutions for enterprise client systems.

Standardized automation workflows to improve release confidence.
